subtopics.title: Understanding the Internet
common_misconceptions: Internet and WWW are the same
Everything on the internet is true
subtopics.teaching_note: Internet: global network of connected computers. WWW (World Wide Web): information system on the internet using hyperlinks. Browser: software to access web (Chrome, Firefox, Edge). URL: web address (e.g., www.google.com). Email: electronic mail. Social media: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok. Cyber safety: don't share passwords, don't meet online friends alone, report cyberbullying, don't click suspicious links. Nigerian tech: Flutterwave, Paystack, Andela, tech hubs in Lagos (Yaba).
